full_text:
Lady Zhang
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Zhangwas born in Nanyang. Zhang Rang persuaded her to gain him one last audience with Empress He. He got rehired. Lady Zhang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
